statement.en: Gated Recurrent Units: From Local to Global Stability Properties

proposer: Pierre Franck, Samuele Zoboli, Romain POSTOYAN et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper dated 2026-04-25 (future date from current perspective, or dating error). Abstract incomplete/missing, preventing substantive truth evaluation. Stability properties of GRUs are partially established (existing literature), but specific claims of this work are unverifiable without content. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional/preprint status and incomplete information.

ramanujanFormula.latex: \sigma\left(\frac{\partial h}{\partial t}\right) = \lim_{\epsilon \to 0^+} \frac{1}{\epsilon}\int_0^\epsilon \tanh(W_r \odot x + U_r \odot h) \, dt
ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 局所から大域への流れは、ゲートの忘却の速度に隠された無限小の記憶が宿る。
